nasb.text: Those who err in mind will know the truth, And those who criticize will accept instruction.

esv.text: And those who go astray in spirit will come to understanding, and those who murmur will accept instruction.”

cnv.text: 那些心中迷惑的，必明白真理， 那些發怨言的，必接受教訓。”

ccb.text: 心里迷惘的必明白真理， 发怨言的必欣然受教。”

csbs.text: 心中迷失的，必得悟性； 发怨言的，必受教诲。”
